The followings ports fail to build with rust 1.70
www/firefox-esr
www/librewolf
www/tor-browser
mail/thunderbird

Error message (same for all failures):
error[E0277]: the trait bound `u64: Mul<NonZeroU8>` is not satisfied
    --> /wrkdirs/usr/ports/mail/thunderbird/work/thunderbird-102.11.2/third_party/rust/mp4parse/src/lib.rs:3188:62
